projectDescription: A fully in-browser video and image editor for creating professional product demos and mockups with 3D device frames, smooth zoom effects, custom backgrounds, and 4K export.
keyFeatures: In-browser screen recording with countdown, camera overlay, and microphone mixing
Video upload (MP4, WebM, MOV, MKV) up to 500MB with IndexedDB persistence
Timeline-based zoom fragments with smooth easing and 3D camera tilt
2D browser/device mockups: Safari, Chrome, Arc, Samsung, iPhone, macOS, VS Code
3D device mockups via Three.js/react-three-fiber: iPhone 13/15/17 Pro, iPad Mini, MacBook, Samsung S24
Canvas elements: text, SVG icons, images, shapes with layer control
100+ wallpaper backgrounds plus custom image/Unsplash/Pexels/Pixabay integration
Solid color and gradient backgrounds (linear, radial, conic) with 50+ presets
Multi-track audio with per-track volume, master volume, and auto-trim
Image masking with presets: none, fade-top, fade-bottom, vignette, diagonal
Photo mode for static image editing with 3D transforms and mockups
Export: 4K/2K/1080p/720p/480p MP4, transparent WebM, GIF, and image formats
URL-based tool routing via ?menu= and ?mode= query params
Fully client-side — no server, no external services required
publicApiSurface: useScreenRecording() — screen recording lifecycle hook (startCountdown, stopRecording, cancelRecording)
useVideoExport(videoRef, canvasRef) — video export hook (exportVideo, cancelExport, exportProgress)
useUndoRedo<T>(initialState) — generic undo/redo with 50-step history
useActiveTool() — reads/writes active tool from ?menu= URL param
useEditorMode() — reads/writes ?mode=video|photo from URL
useVideoUpload() — validates and saves video to IndexedDB (uploadVideo, loadUploadedVideo)
useVideoThumbnails(videoUrl, duration, options) — progressive thumbnail generation with caching
useScreenCapture() — one-shot screen capture returning PNG blob
useImageProjects() — CRUD for photo editing sessions in IndexedDB
loadVideoFromIndexedDB() — loads last recorded/uploaded video from IndexedDB
deleteRecordedVideo() — purges recorded video from IndexedDB
calculateZoomPhaseState(fragment, currentTime, forExport) — calculates zoom scale/focus/3D for a given time
createZoomFragment(startTime, endTime) — factory for ZoomFragment with defaults
zoomLevelToFactor(level) — converts zoom level 1–10 to actual CSS scale factor
speedToTransitionMs(speed) — converts speed 1–10 to transition duration in ms
gradientToCss(config) — converts GradientConfig to CSS gradient string
createInitialEditorState(overrides?) — factory for the full EditorState object
RecordingContext / useRecording() — context hook exposing recording state tree
Mockup3dContext / useMockup3dContext() — context hook for 3D phone mockup state
QUALITY_SETTINGS — export resolution presets keyed by quality string (4k, 2k, 1080p, 720p, 480p, gif, webm-alpha)
IMAGE_DEVICE_TEMPLATES — array of 3D device mockup definitions with model URLs and preset IDs
WALLPAPER_CATEGORIES — catalog of 280+ wallpaper images across 4 categories
